title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO MANGARATUNGAT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JONES, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO SAN VICENTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 87

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2099, March 28, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO MANGARATUNGAT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JONES, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO SAN VICENTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Mangaratungat in the Municipality of Jones, Province of Isabela, is hereby changed to San Vicente.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, March 28, 1959.
